level1_maxPreviewRows.description: L4 mapper defaults maxPreviewRows to 50. Plan/apply routes don't override it. CLI trial only processed 50 of 1167 rows, yielding 4 importable instead of 175.
level1_maxPreviewRows.fix: Add maxPreviewRows: 100000 to partial-import-plan/route.ts, partial-import-apply/route.ts, and CLI trial script.

level2_importableDefinition.description: L7-A3 counts resolutionStatus='autoAllowedNewCourse' as importable (903). L6-E2 plan requires zero blockers (175). 434 rows have teacherMissing/examTypeInvalid/ambiguousMapping/weeklyHoursInvalid blockers.

level3_classGroupScope.description: Semester 4 has 0 ClassGroups. Historical ClassGroups are in LEGACY-DEFAULT semester. No TeachingTaskClass links can be created.
level3_classGroupScope.fix: User must import ClassGroups into semester 4 or select a semester with ClassGroups.

firstDivergence.level2: browser plan importableRows=175 = CLI plan importableRows=175 (buildInitialManualResolutionState makes no difference to L6-E2 plan)
firstDivergence.level3: semester 4 has 0 ClassGroups — cannot create TeachingTaskClass links

recommendation.nextStage: Fix maxPreviewRows in plan/apply routes; ensure target semester has ClassGroups; re-run trial.
